untranslatable_reason: Measure rule requires multi-leg historical calculation: (1) identify first leg high-low range dynamically, (2) locate corrective phase lowest low, (3) calculate target as lowest_low + (0.5 × first_leg_range). This requires lookback state tracking and custom calculation logic not expressible in single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern is fundamentally structural/multi-timeframe rather than indicator-based. Recommend: implement as custom pattern detector or use external indicator that outputs the calculated target price as a separate series.
